name: ETH Value Recovery Scale-In v1
thesis: ETH 1h is the best-fit primary lane for value-recovery scale-in because the live program explicitly asks for improved confirmation across bars rather than one-shot timing, and the faster lane should provide materially denser participation than the 4h alternatives.
edge_mechanism: value recovery continuation with staged entry
invalidation_condition: Abort if recovery setups are too rare, if the add-on confirmation conflicts with the reclaim logic, or if the scale-in leg worsens expectancy after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price dislocates from value, reclaims the near-term structure reference, then confirms acceptance on subsequent bars strongly enough to justify adding rather than entering full size immediately.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Transitioning intraday markets often punish exact bottom-picking but reward staged participation once recovery is visibly being accepted.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 1h is the right lane because multi-bar confirmation is an intraday mechanism and should trade more plausibly on 1h than on 4h while still keeping structure readable.

indicator_role_map.PLUS_DI_14/MINUS_DI_14: direction confirmation for the scale-in leg

pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If recovery bars are only dead-cat bounces and not genuine acceptance, the add-on leg will amplify a weak thesis.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If base entries work but scale-ins hurt expectancy, preserve the base reclaim and tighten the add-on confirmation.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; reclaim, improving RSI, and DI agreement are sequential rather than conflicting
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad recovery thresholds instead of rare extreme events

trade_management.add_on_condition: Next bar closes in trade direction and RSI_14 improves by at least 2 points while DI confirmation persists

long: Stop loss: 0.95 * ATR_14 below blended entry
short: Stop loss: 0.95 * ATR_14 above blended entry
